series_metadata.series_title: Ohio State Patrol (OSP) Suspicious Activity Reports
series_metadata.series_description: The record series includes Suspicious Activity Reports (SARS) and all supporting documentation, including, but not limited to emails, photographs, and recordings submitted by law enforcement agencies, first responders, and the general public to the OSP Intelligence Unit.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in Intelligence Unit’s data-system five (5) years provided that information is no longer relevant as a security threat
